title: Root’s Journal
bodyText:
Hidden journal from Darkpass Manor (trap-triggered, S20; read by [[pc-felson|Felson]] + [[pc-brolin|Brolin]], S21). The party's window into [[root-darkpass|Root]].

# Sellie and Becks
[[vorrec]] (old cleric) reported both dead — "birth went wrong. Twisted magic involved. Bodies burned. Remains buried. No viewing." Root ordered the cover story ("natural death"), told Brolin, poured a drink, went back to work. **He believed it.**

# [[the-underdark]] dig
Survey crew found a passage under the **Marble Shelf**. Root sealed the information inside the guild — "This belongs to us." Vines that regrew after cutting were hacked and burned; sweet smell dismissed as fungal; then the earthquake, the plant-creatures, two dead. **Sent Tad and a squad to follow the vines "by whatever means necessary." No word from Tad.**

# The sickness
Spores from the dig; guild locked down; healers hired for **his** people ("Heard it's spreading into the city. That's the city's problem.").

# On Brolin
"He didn't find faith. He found an audience. I know the difference." … "Raised him to build something real." … On [[ms-judy]]: what worried Root wasn't her — it was that his son "looked at something like that and saw an opportunity."

> [!dm] The journal never mentions Mr. Spells — yet Spells said "our business is over." Whatever their business was, Root kept it out of writing.
